fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account number. If you select Balance at Date, the balance as of the last day in the relevant time interval is displayed.

fields.name: Upload Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the Positive Pay file was uploaded.

fields.name: Last Upload Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date that you exported a Positive Pay file.

fields.name: Last Upload Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last time that you exported a Positive Pay file.

fields.name: Number of Uploads
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the related Positive Pay file was uploaded.

fields.name: Number of Checks
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many checks were processed with the Positive Pay entry.

fields.name: Number of Voids
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many of the related checks were voided.

fields.name: Check Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount on the check.

fields.name: Void Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the Positive Pay file that is related to voided checks.

fields.name: Confirmation Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the confirmation number that you receive when the file upload to the bank is successful.
